content: Cargo feature pitfalls: (1) --no-default-features is NOT propagated to dependencies in workspaces - a peer crate that depends on the same dep with default features re-enables them; (2) cargo test --all ignores --no-default-features for member crates; (3) CI must explicitly test both 'cargo test' (full) and 'cargo build --no-default-features' (render-only). Optional deps gated on features must not be referenced in non-gated modules or you get compile errors in the disabled config.
